name: HVA Electric Ball Valve
desc: Quarter-turn electric ball valve for fast open/close operation, compatible with various media types including water, steam and chemicals.
overview: The HVA series electric three-way valve is available in T-type (mixing) and L-type (diverting) configurations for chiller blending, district heating and industrial process control. Full-stroke response in ≤5 seconds. Supports HART, Modbus and RS485 with IP65–IP68 protection options.

specs.label: Connection method
specs.value: Flange (RF/RTJ), butt weld, socket weld, threaded (small diameter)

specs.label: Applicable media
specs.value: Liquids: water, oil, acid/base; Gas: air, steam; Mixed: hot-cold liquid blend

specs.label: Valve body material
specs.value: Carbon steel / Stainless steel / Duplex steel

specs.label: Sealing form
specs.value: Soft seal (PTFE/EPDM/PPL); Hard seal (Stellite spray weld)

specs.label: Response time
specs.value: Full stroke: 5–15 s (depending on diameter / torque)

features: Precise mixing ratio control: mixing/diverting accuracy ±1%, continuous blending from 0–100%; flow direction switch ≤5 seconds
Monolithic three-way valve body: no additional piping required, minimising leakage risk; pressure loss ≤0.8
Wide turndown ratio 50:1 standard (100:1 high-end); supports equal-percentage and linear flow characteristics
High sealing grade, virtually zero leakage: disc and seat are wear-resistant with service life ≥100,000 cycles
Compatible with water, oil, steam, acid/base solutions; explosion-proof version for hazardous conditions
Supports Modbus/HART communication protocols with analogue signal input
